name: Facebook Graph API
description: Facebook Graph API is the primary API for reading and writing to the Facebook social graph. Manage pages, publish posts, upload photos and videos, read user profiles, manage comments, and access page insights and analytics.

capabilities.name: user_profile_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the authenticated user profile with name, email, and picture.

capabilities.name: pages_list
capabilities.description: List all Facebook Pages managed by the authenticated user.

capabilities.name: page_posts_create
capabilities.description: Create a new post on a Facebook Page.

capabilities.name: page_feed_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve recent posts from a Page feed.

capabilities.name: page_insights_get
capabilities.description: Fetch analytics metrics for a Facebook Page.

capabilities.name: photos_upload
capabilities.description: Upload a photo to a Page or user album.

capabilities.name: post_comments_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve comments on a specific post.

capabilities.name: post_comments_create
capabilities.description: Reply to a post with a comment.

capabilities.name: post_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific post by ID.

capabilities.name: videos_upload
capabilities.description: Upload a video to a Page.
